programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, Wu and Pixal attempt to locate the Never-Realm and accidentally unleash a dreaded creature from the Departed Realm.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The story of Zane's arrival in the Never-Realm and how he fell under the sway of the villainous Vex.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Having discovered the terrible truth of Zane's fate, Lloyd finds himself imprisoned and alone in the clutches of the Ice Emperor.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya, Jay, Cole and Kai face off against the Ice Emperor's dreaded dragon, while Lloyd and his newfound allies, Kataru and Grimfax, confront the Ice Emperor himself.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The dramatic conclusion of the Never-Realm saga, in which old friends are reunited and the power of friendship is pitted against the corrupting power of the Scroll of Forbidden Spinjitzu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: While investigating a heist, the ninja discover Prime Empire, an unreleased arcade game that suddenly takes control of all other games in Ninjago

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: When the ninja connect Jay's disappearance to Prime Empire, they set out to Dyer Island to seek answers from the game's designer, Milton Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cyrus Borg discovers a secret about Prime Empire while the ninja battle an escaped Mechanic in an attempt to reach Level Thirteen and enter the game.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Inside Prime Empire, the ninja are in unfamiliar territory, ignorant of the rules, as they try to find Zane and escape Unagami's Red Visors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Inside one of the game zones, a Samurai named Okino faces a crisis of faith when he fails to lead a series of Masters to victory.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to stop Unagami, the ninja must obtain 3 Key-tanas, the first of which is hidden in Terra Karana–one of the most dangerous game environments.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja climb the 'Cliffs of Hysteria and discover that Unagami is converting players into energy cubes to build a portal into the real world.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Still in the game zone Terra Karana, Okino has to choose between helping his allies the ninja, or obeying the evil orders of his Master, Unagami.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja learn that the only way to acquire the 2nd Key-tana is by winning a race in Terra Technica and have to find racing cars in unexpected ways

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: As the ninja prepare for the brutal Speedway Five-Billion race, Lloyd meets a race driver named Seven who may hold the key to victory.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami's soldiers, the Red Visors, finally discover the secret location of Scott's garage and attack the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Our ninja barely have time to mourn the loss of their fallen ninja friends before being thrust into the madness of Terra Domina.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, Zane and Pixal hit the mean streets to track down Milton Dyer, only to discover that things are not what they seem...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Zane, kidnapped by the Mechanic, faces Unagami while Pixal questions Milton Dyer for information on how to shut down Prime Empire.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay must stand alone against Unagami in the end-game, yet Unagami has a bigger battle in facing the truth about his own identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami breaks into the real world and terrorizes Ninjago City while Jay, Zane and Pixal attempt to prevent disaster by reuniting Unagami with Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja are invited to attend the birthday party of Princess Vania in the Kingdom of Shintaro. They bring along Master Wu who is feeling his age.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Princess Vania reveals a secret entrance that leads to an underground mine beneath Shintaro where the city's dark secrets are held.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja attempt to rescue Cole, but the bickering of his fellow prisoners alerts the Skull Sorcerer, and soon the ninja are prisoners too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to escape the Skull Sorcerer's chain-gang, the ninja must convince the Munce and Geckles to put aside their distrust and work together.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay, Nya and Lloyd are led into the Mines of Shintaro by Murt who brings them back to the Munce "Home-Cave". The Munce Queen takes a liking to Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: A party of Geckles suspect Kai and Zane of being in league with the Skull Sorcerer and bring them to their leader who subjects them to a Trial-By-Mino

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Separated from the others, Cole must find his way to the surface to alert King Vangelis of the dangerous Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: An entire episode chronicles how Cole, Princess Vania and Master Wu fall down a seemingly endless tunnel, into the bowels of Shintaro Mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Wu and Princess Vania befriend a motley group of survivors, called the Lowly, and are told the story of how they too ended up at "Rock-Bottom."

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Having joined forces with the Lowly in their quest to defeat King Vangelis, Cole, Wu, and Vania have to find a way out of the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Nya and Kai, who have become the leaders of the Munce and Geckles, try to unite the tribes and defeat their mutual enemy, the Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Princess Vania, Wu & the Lowly arrive at a temple in Shintaro Mountain which was once a training ground for Earth Elementals incl. Cole's mother

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja, the Munce and the Geckles take refuge in the Geckle Strong-Cave about to confront the Skull Sorcerer and Grief-Bringer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, the Lowly, Princess Vania and Wu blast their way out of the mountain to confront the evil Skull Sorcerer!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole and the Upply arrive to rescue Lloyd and the ninja. To do so, Cole will need to retrieve his mother's fabled swords, the Blades of Deliverance.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The battle for the fate of Shintaro Mountain concludes!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: An expedition led by Misako, Master Wu and Clutch Powers goes missing while exploring an uncharted island and the ninja must pick up their trail...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Having survived their journey to the island, the ninja venture inland, where they unexpectedly befriend a dragon and are ambushed by living statues!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja find themselves captured by the 'Keepers of the Amulet', who seem to be treating Jay particularly well. Meanwhile, Lloyd stages a rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: As Jay is sacrificed to the sea serpent that terrorizes the island, the other ninja begin to suspect events on the island are not all as they seem...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: When Nya loses control of her elemental powers, the ninja must search for answers, which may lie with the former Master of Water – Nya's mother.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya's mother, Maya, arrives with advice on how to regain control of Nya's powers. Meanwhile, Zane and Pixal discover that something else may be behind the disturbances.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja embark on a mission to uncover the source of a mysterious power signal that is disrupting marine life and Nya's powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and Maya discover the source of the energy pulse that has been disrupting Nya's powers and come face-to-face with a dangerous new villain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and her mother Maya attempt to escape from the evil Prince Kalmaar, who schemes to overthrow his father, the benevolent King Trimaar.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar deceives the Merlopians and turns the ninja into fugitives.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Good-Bye Partner"
programme.desc: When Zenigata is arrested for suspicion of being part of the Lupin gang, Lupin is talked into stealing Time Crystal to prove Pops' innocence.

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Blood Seal of the Eternal Mermaid"
programme.desc: The Mermaid's Scale is a mysterious aquamarine gemstone that Lupin has been hired to steal it... but it turns out to be a forgery. Now, he needs to find the real jewel before it can be used to destroy the whole world!

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with the fallout of their elopement and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Heidi crashes Laurens surprise birthday party, the two old friends cry about their disintegrated friendship. Spencer starts a violent fistfight when Cameron accuses him of picking up a bartender.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer's flirtatious ways lead Heidi home to Colorado, where she reconnects with an old boyfriend. Lauren gives Stephanie a piece of her mind for inviting Heidi to her birthday party. Spencer ends a long silence with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: After Heidi catches Spencer at a nightclub with Stacie the bartender, she demand's they go to couple's therapy. Lauren puts her reputation on the line when she gets Stephanie an internship at People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by setting her sights on Brody. Heidi drags Spencer kicking and screaming to couples therapy. When Stephanie screws up at People's Revolution, Lauren threatens to fire her.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by hooking up with Brody when the girls crash the boy's surf trip to Hawaii. Heidi's virgin ex-boyfriend comes to visit and she hopes some of his values will rub off on Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina is heartbroken when Brody's girlfriend confronts her about Hawaii, and Brody does nothing to stop it. Heidi intercepts a text message from Stacie to Spencer and goes to a nightclub to confront her.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Justin confronts Audrina about hooking up with Brody in Hawaii. Stephanie ruins a photo shoot at work, which means Lauren will have to answer to Kelly. Stacie the bartender tries to make peace with Heidi.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer tries to save his relationship with Heidi by asking her cowboy dad's permission to get married. Lauren must fire Stephanie from People's Revolution, risking their friendship.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren thinks twice about going to Heidi's wedding after Spencer finally apologizes. Brody refuses to risk his relationship with Jayde to save his friendship with Audrina, and Stephanie confronts Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: In Lauren's final episode, she must decide whether she's willing to forgive Spencer in order to be there for Heidi on the day of her "princess" wedding. The entire cast shows up and is shocked by a guest no one saw coming.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin Cavallari's attempt to reconnect with her Hollywood friends goes awry when she angers Audrina by hitting on Justin. Heidi and Spencer embark on married life by shopping for a new house.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: After being stood up by Audrina, Kristin decides to stop fighting her attraction to Justin. Heidi volunteers to babysit the next door neighbor, but Spencer wants nothing to do with kids.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin gets her first taste of being in a relationship with Justin when he doesn't show at Brody's surprise party. Heidi and Spencer disagree about when to start a family, and Audrina goes on a date with Justin's best friend.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin thinks she has tamed Justin Bobby, but Justin may not be over Audrina just yet. When Holly loses control at an event, it's up to Heidi to make her sister confront her drinking problem.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo lo que empieza tiene que terminar y así pasa con estas vacaciones en las costas del mediterráneo. Llega la hora en que los chicos de Súper Shore deberán de despedirse.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos repasan los mejores momentos de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Ellos verán las mejores fiestas, las peleas, los momentos más importantes de sus vacaciones y lo que eso conlleva

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera noche de Karime y Labrador en la casa se celebra con una grandiosa fiesta en la que Cañete es víctima de Karime. Para salir de la dinámica de fiestas y chiringuitos de playa, los chicos planean irse de acampada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta del verano comienza para nuestros shores en la isla paradisiaca de Mykonos donde se desatan las primeras pasiones entre shots y diversión pura

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera madrugada en Mykonos es muy agitada para nuestros shores, sobre todo para Mane, Esteban, Fernando y una invitada española

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shores comienzan el día paseo en barco donde las mexicanas dejan claro la antipatía hacia la millonaria italiana. Tras un regreso, los chicos disfrutan en un club de playa de una tarde de sol y bellezas

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Comienza la despedida de Mykonos por todo lo alto. Primera parada en un club de playa donde Elettra demuestra a Abraham que es algo posesiva. Tras una cena típica griega, bailes incluidos, terminan la noche de Mykonos en una discoteca

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después de una intensa mañana de trabajo en el gimnasio, Arantxa comunica a sus amigos que lo está pasando mal en su relación con Igor. El resto del día lo pasan conociendo Madrid, paseando y en un bus turístico

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Abraham decide confesar a sus compañeros el romance entre Arantxa y Fernando. El grupo se divide para pasar la tarde en el gimnasio y en la peluquería. Luego en la casa, Arantxa vive un momento muy intenso

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa después de la disco Arantxa se enfrenta intensamente a Elettra mientras Abraham se enfada mucho con Mane porque cree que esta se ríe de su amiga española

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuestros Shores siguen conociendo Madrid. Tras unos momentos picantes durante una típica siesta española, dan un paseo por el centro de la capital.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Sigue el conflicto entre Igor y Arantxa, y también entre Abraham y Elettra por un bofetón de camino a casa donde la fiesta continúa. Mientras tanto uno de los mexicanos sufre un accidente que lo llevará directo al hospital

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras Esteban está en la habitación del amor dos de sus invitadas provocan un conflicto en la casa. Lo que en principio era una fiesta de risas y cachondeo se convierte en una guerra donde el joven acabará perdiendo los estribos

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The three couples who married as strangers return from their honeymoons.

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The dust has settled from the holidays.

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: In just the two weeks of knowing each other, the three couples met and married.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Unmatchables
programme.desc: Frank is a shy, over-thinking perfectionist. Sam, in contrast, is an over-the-top, full-of-himself, eccentric wildflower.

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: With the honeymoon period over, the couples face the challenges of everyday life.

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: Three newlywed couples that married at first sight must learn to cope.

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: Three couples discuss sex and intimacy struggles with Dr. Logan Levkoff.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.desc: Shamed by the drama that broke out at their brokers' open, James and David try to salvage their relationship with the sellers; Tracy tries to find a home for her friend; Flagg creates a hilarious short film to help market an ultra-modern listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: In an attempt to sell her Del Mar listing, Tracy heads to the racetrack in search of wealthy buyers; Josh Altman faces wife Heather when trying to sell a problematic listing; Josh Flagg bakes up a plan to get back on James and David's good side.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman goes full hipster in his last ditch effort to sell an architectural wonder in a trendy Venice neighborhood; Tracy takes over a stale listing in Brentwood and attempts to revive the grandeur of the historic Georgian estate.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Michael tasks James and brother David with finding him a development opportunity, leading to a visit to the house where the movie, "Mommie Dearest," was filmed; Josh Flagg battles his control issues while teaming up with Bobby.

programme.desc: In an attempt to sell a villa that has sat on the market for a year, Josh Altman rents a dunk tank to entice buyers; James and David enter heated negotiations involving the Playboy Bunny Ranch and the "Mommie Dearest" house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James works hard to sell a home to singer Kelly Rowland; Josh Flagg gets creative to sell a Bel Air pad built for guitarist Robby Krieger; Tracy lands a shot at representing a billion-dollar development in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A trained falcon is summoned in a last-ditch rescue attempt when Jim Phelps finds his IMF endangered by a traitor's assassination plot in the last of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture of a blue tree. In art, you can make things any way you want. He also talks about visiting art museums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers "colors a song" by playing music by Mozart to inspire his artwork. King Friday is curious about a delivery to X the Owl labelled "Deliver to X the Owl ONLY."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow approaching with his imaginary dog. Robert Troll and his imaginary pet, Gloria, are visiting with Queen Sara. When the Queen departs for a meeting, Gloria disappears into the castle.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about people who make umbrellas. It's raining in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe and Neighbor Aber is interested in a special sale at the factory where Corney has manufactured Umbrella Rockits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by for some sitting down exercises. Prince Tuesday asks Handyman Negri to help bring his ragdoll to life. Corney has made a new (imaginary) umbrella Rockit for Daniel's imaginary friend, Malcolm Apricot Dinko.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers delights in a visitor who can whistle, especially because that's something Mister Rogers hasn't been able to learn. Nobody can do everything!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks and sings about wondering and being curious, which is important for learning! Jazz saxophonist Eric Kloss, who is blind, shows how he uses a special machine called the Kurzweil Personal Reader!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Elevators and escalators - Mister Rogers shows some toy machines, and rides on real ones that lift people and cars. There's even a hydraulic platform delivered by Mr. McFeely in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A domino display artist sets up thousands of dominoes. When one is knocked over, they all go down in a fascinating pattern. Lady Elaine's elevator in Make-Believe takes Robert Troll up in the air as if he's flying.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Flags, marbles, a slide – so many things go up and down. Mister Rogers learns some up and down exercises from Neighbor Marilyn Barnett and Kara, a young ballerina.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A visit with world famous clarinetist, Richard Stoltzman, who makes music playing notes that go up and down. In Make-Believe, there's hope that an elevator operator will solve the up and down problem at Lady Elaine's Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A look up at the symbol of the American Century - the skyscraper; the construction of which is a triumph of engineering and capitalism; climb to the top of the Empire State Building, Chrysler Building, Sears Tower, and World Trade Center.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Features rare construction footage and interviews with architects, the program climbs to the top of the world's largest towers including Seattle's Space Needle, Canada's CN Tower, and Las Vegas's Stratosphere.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: It started as an idea at a French dinner party and became the symbol of the free world; the story of France's gift to the US reveals a 20-year struggle to design and build the world's largest monument using paper-thin copper sheets.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Explore the arch, one of humanity's strongest and most versatile structures; Romans perfected what Egyptians and Greeks experimented with, Arabs incorporated into mosques, Europeans into churches, and modern builders use in dams and future space.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The task was monumental: build the world's largest dam in the middle of the desert, and tame the river that carved the Grand Canyon, all in seven years; when the Hoover Dam was completed in 1935, it was the largest dam in the world.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The world's largest concrete dam, and the largest concrete structure in the world, lies on the Columbia River in the State of Washington; built in 1931, it is also one of the largest hydroelectric power plants in the world.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Since its completion in 1869, the Suez Canal has been a vital link in world trade and a point of controversy in geopolitics; today, more than 20,000 ships transit the canal yearly.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: When finally completed, China's Three Gorges Dam will tower 607 feet in the air and weigh more than forty Great Pyramids; along with China's Great Wall, it will constitute of the two man-made objects visible from the moon.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Many rivers quenched the thirst of millions in the American west and around the world; without these aqueducts, some of the earth's largest cities would turn into gigantic ghost towns.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In 1973, a desperate America, starved by an OPEC embargo, began construction on an 800 mile lifeline for its oil hunger; study the technological triumph of the Alaskan oil pipeline built over mountains and tundra, where temperatures drop below zero.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: Produced in Scotland and the American South, whiskey is popular, has a colorful history, and is one of the world's oldest drinks.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In hour three of our crash course on mega-skyscraper construction, we learn about the human element and development of systems that make us comfortable.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Data lines; power; plumbing; photovoltaics; conserving energy; painting; carpeting; moving furniture; lights.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The art deco Chrysler Building stands out in the New York skyline.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights 136
programme.desc: Experience all the action from the world’s largest martial arts organization on ONE Championship TV, featuring MMA, Muay Thai, kickboxing, and more! Check out the best fighters on the planet, weekly events, and behind-the-scenes originals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is to be executed in a matter of hours, and Magellan's toxic breath is singeing the back of Luffy's neck. Ivan uses a devastating Death Wink to buy some time, but the warden's Poison Hydra may be more than he can handle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy dons a suit of waxy armor in preparation for his rematch with Warden Magellan. Outside the prison walls, Jimbei turns a door into a boat, so Crocodile and Buggy can commandeer an escape vessel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Magellan takes his toxic attack to the next level by unleashing the hideous and deadly Venom Demon! If Jimbei and Crocodile don't return with a rescue ship soon, Luffy won't survive long enough to save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his merry band of escapees are safely onboard the rescue ship, but they're not out of hot water just yet. A fleet of marines is bombarding them with cannon balls, and an impenetrable gate looms on the horizon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Ivan mourn the loss of Bon Clay, and Captain Buggy's reputation gets a boost when a phone call from the Marines reveals the secrets of his past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his rescue mission, Nami learns a lesson about how to turn rain into cash, and Franky wakes up in a freezing forest full of ferocious cyborg animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries to fight his way off a most peculiar island, but his frilly battle costume threatens to awaken his inner maiden. Elsewhere, Chopper tries to avoid being served in a hot pot!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin lends her many hands to an overmatched gang of revolutionaries in a frigid land of eternal suffering, and Usopp bulks up to avoid becoming a snack for a hungry, hungry island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's attempt to reunite with his friends leads him to a massive tomb and a host of shadowy swordsmen. Elsewhere, Brook uses his status as Satan to get an eyeful of undergarments!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the marines prepare for Ace's execution, Luffy looks back on all the good times he shared with his brother, and Jimbei reveals the shocking details of the day Fire Fist Ace went down in defeat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang continue on their way to Marineford, but once he arrives, the rubber-man must defeat both Navy Admirals and Warlords of the Sea before he can save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Citizens and soldiers alike prepare for all-out war as Ace is led to the site of his execution. While the world watches, the true identity of the condemned man's father is shockingly revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal the agonizing sacrifice made by Ace's mother in order save his life – and the secret behind his connection to Luffy. Back in the present, Whitebeard makes an unexpected entrance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a massive seaquake rocks Marineford, Ace recalls the ups and downs of his life as a pirate, including his first encounter with Whitebeard – and the unthinkable betrayal that led to his capture!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard begins his attack with a tsunami-spawning sea quake, but the marines counter with a blast of frigid air that turns the tidal wave into an iceberg! Will Luffy and his crew arrive in time to join the battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire meets ice as mythical warriors, erupting admirals, legendary pirates, and a giant giant go head to head in the biggest, baddest battle of all time! There's only one thing missing: Monkey D. Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A towering giant of a giant known as Little Oars Jr. carves a path of death and destruction as he fights to save Ace. The monstrous mauler is within arm's reach of his friend when he's intercepted by the seven warlords of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Little Oars Junior's tragic defeat, Admiral Sengoku hatches a devious plan to speed up the countdown to Ace's execution. The situation looks beyond bleak until a hero enters the fray from on high!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy appears on the field of battle with a ferocious sense of urgency. Ace could be executed at any minute, and the rubber-man's refusal to back down impresses even the most feared men in all the world!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leaps into action, attacking the Naval forces with a frantic display of brutality. Meanwhile, Ace watches in horror as an army of zombies rises up to attack his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Supernatural powers take center stage in the battle to save Ace as Luffy and his uniquely talented allies throw down with the Navy's own arsenal of Devil Fruit Eaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A gift from Boa Hancock and Ivan-san's Galaxy Wink get Luffy closer to Ace than ever, but a sword-wielding foe from the past threatens to derail the rescue mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into a lethal roadblock in the form of Hawk-Eye Mihawk. The legendary swordsman is determined to halt Luffy's onslaught, but Ivan-san, Boa Hancock, and Jimbei aren't ready to give up the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his pirate brethren have their hands full with an ominous army of unbeatable Kumas! While the inhuman minions march onward, Whitebeard encounters a former ally!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard is betrayed – and brutally stabbed – by one of his own men! In the wake of this unthinkable act of treason, allegations about the legendary pirate bring the battle to a halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard shrugs off his injuries and leads a ferocious charge into the heart of the enemy's defenses, but three deadly Admirals join forces to silence his shock wave attack as the pirates find themselves surrounded by impenetrable walls!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the ice melting beneath his feet, Luffy begins a desperate final charge towards his soon-to-be-executed brother. Should his rescue attempt fail, death will surely embrace them both!

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: U.S. President Thompson (Barry Flatman) declares a national emergency and imposes martial law until the Resistance is crushed.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili's (Lisa Howard) fate lies in Sandoval's (Von Flores) hands as political allegiances continue to shift.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) team up to rescue the Skrill Queen, who has been kidnapped by a group of renegade Volunteers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Ancient Taelon artifacts smuggled into the United States lead to the discovery of Ma'el's ship.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) discovers Taelon technology being sold on the black market is the cause of inexplicable deaths.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, Liam (Robert Leeshock) is betrayed by Augur (Richard Chevolleau) while Sandoval (Von Flores) fights for his life against a deadly blood disorder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) is framed for murder when he investigates the activities of a set of Taelon/human hybrid twins created years ago by Da'an (Leni Parker).

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) discover Zo'or (Anita La Selva) and Sandoval's (Von Flores) plan to create perfect soldiers out of bio-surrogates to fight the Jaridians.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Marquette (Lisa Howard) falls victim to an elaborate Jaridian scheme that will forever alter the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) investigate a series of mysterious deaths involving a group of women, led by Sister Margaret (special guest star Marina Sirtis), that has the ability to spiritually bond with the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A live television interview with Zo'or (Anita La Selva) goes awry when a news reporter airs secret Taelon tapes and embarks on a deadly mission that Liam (Robert Leeshock) must thwart.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) must decide whether to save the life of his enemy Zo'or (Anita La Selva), who suffers serious injuries after their shuttle crashes in a remote part of the United States.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zo'or (Anita La Selva) and Sandoval (Von Flores) implement an elaborate plan to assassinate T'than (Michelle Nolden), the Taelon War Minister.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) learn that the Taelons secretly inhabited the Earth during the SI War and used a weapon of mass destruction to further their cause.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio, is terrorized over the Christmas holiday as a string of brutal shootings have the residents wondering if they could be next.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Beloved Christmas tree farmers are executed in the front seat of their car and a manhunt for their killer is launched that keeps investigators on the case for over three decades before justice is served.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A Thanksgiving feast turns into a family's last when a cold blooded killer brutally stabs and dismembers a couple the day after their holiday celebration.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio, is terrorized over the Christmas holiday as a string of brutal shootings have the residents wondering if they could be next.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Beloved Christmas tree farmers are executed in the front seat of their car and a manhunt for their killer is launched that keeps investigators on the case for over three decades before justice is served.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young mother is murdered during Christmas, investigators uncover a love triangle that shocks her family and forever robs them of their holiday cheer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A teenage boy discovers a real-life horror scene in his home on Halloween morning; investigators must determine if the triple homicide is a random act of evil or a premeditated slaughter by someone close to the family.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a single young mother fails to show up for work on Halloween, her family and friends suspect murder.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A prominent couple are found brutally murdered in their Montgomery, Ala., home on Thanksgiving night, leading detectives on a cat-and-mouse chase spanning thousands of miles across multiple states.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young man and woman are found shot execution-style in a mall parking lot in the early hours of Christmas Eve, investigators believe a love triangle might have led to these brutal murders.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing after a July 4th beach party, investigators have few clues to go on until a twist in the case reveals she might be the latest victim of a predator terrorizing the area.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: An abandoned car filled with blood leads investigators on the trail of a missing woman and her teenage daughter, who never showed up to the family's July 4th party; when their remains are found in a pond, everyone in their small town is a suspect.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a woman and her unborn child are stabbed to death on Halloween by a man wearing a wolf mask, investigators must calm the community and find the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young woman home from college ends up murdered in her home and the tools of her demise turn out to be the rolling pin and carving knife the family planned to use for Thanksgiving dinner, investigators struggle to solve this holiday horror.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After responding to a robbery at a sporting goods store on Christmas Eve, an Irving, Texas police officer is gunned down in cold blood.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead on the side of the road, detectives are faced with the possibility that the killer might have been one of the many partygoers ringing in the new year.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A deranged shooter attacks a family Thanksgiving dinner, leaving four dead and even more wounded, setting off a massive holiday-season manhunt to catch the killer - before they can strike again.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Based on Ian Fleming's first 007 novel, James Bond (Daniel Craig) must thwart a dangerous Russian spy who is funding global terrorists from winning a poker game worth millions. The 21st film in the most successful film series in cinematic history.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: Spectre
programme.desc: A cryptic message from Bond's past sends him on a trail to uncover a sinister organization. While M battles political forces to keep the secret service alive, Bond peels back the layers of deceit to reveal the terrible truth behind SPECTRE.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: 007: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: 007: Otro día para morir

programme.title: 007: Operación Skyfall

programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors?

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Buying partnerships are tested at an auction in Brampton. Bogart puts Paul on a diet. Meanwhile, Rick squirms when Cindy wants him to wear a spiffy new shirt. Ursula tries on her bossy-pants, but what Roy finds really puts the icing on the cake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: After months of waiting for Cindy to set a wedding date, Rick makes a bold move at an auction in Mississauga. Roy records his memoirs for bidding posterity. Ursula finds a new place to stash her booze, and Paul and Bogart get conched on the head.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Bogart's hooked on goji berry juice and plans to spread the word at an auction in Milton. Roy is in all white, looking to spread distraction. Cindy's mind is on the lockers, but Rick's is in the gutter. Ursula has a bonsai to pick with her locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy reaches new levels of distraction by training a talking parrot to insult the rest of the buyers at an auction in Etobicoke. Rick and Cindy do some detective work, Ursula could use a hand, and Paul and Bogart make money where the sun doesn't shine.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula 'bro's out' at an auction in Ajax where she runs into buyers Mike and Armando. Bogart wears an eye-patch to cover an injury. Rick and Cindy do some basic training. Mike and Armando go for a spin with ice racing champion Anthony Barlow.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: It’s round robin mind-games when Ursula outsmarts Roy…who outsmarts Cindy…who outsmarts Paul and Bogart, who not so smartly make a bad decision.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The father/son team of Paul and Bogart splits up to go locker vs locker in Claireville. May the best Kenny win!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: A Brampton auction near some of the gang’s old high school proves they’re all still rowdy teenagers at heart.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Captain Kirk's career is at stake when he is put on trial for the loss of a crewman during an ion storm.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a seemingly peaceful civilization run by a "benevolent" being named Landru...who intends for them to join his people.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is sent to a mining colony that is being terrorized by a mysterious monster, only to find that the situation is not that simple.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: With a war raging, Kirk and Spock battle Klingons to free Organia.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock encounter a mysterious alien named Lazarus who claims to be hunting a ruthless maniacal creature.

programme.desc: Spock must return to Vulcan to meet his intended future wife, betrothed from childhood.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters an alien who claims to be the Greek god Apollo.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters an ancient Earth probe bent on the sterilization of all life.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: In order to boost his business and gain respect, Quark lies about killing a Klingon, then winds up forced to marry the dead man's widow.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A trapped crew fights to save the station from self-destruction when an automated Cardassian security program is accidentally activated.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Wil Riker's renegade duplicate steals the Defiant and attacks Cardassian territory, forcing Sisko to assist Gul Dukat in stopping him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Bajoran celebration on the station serves as the backdrop for an epidemic of inexplicable romantic attractions among the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir must use questionable methods in order to keep Vedek Bareil alive long enough to help bring about a Bajoran peace treaty with Cardassia.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor seizes an opportunity to save the life of the man who created him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Captain Janeway faces her biggest battle yet against the Borg—assimilation.

programme.desc: Seven's long-lost love lures Janeway into a deadly encounter with the Borg Queen.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A malfunction in Seven's cortical node threatens to destroy her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tom and B'Elanna's relationship could be the loser when Tom enters a race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok's investigation of a series of mysterious attacks aboard Voyager leads him to a most unlikely suspect: himself.

programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to work on an alien ship where patients' care is determined by their social status instead of medical need.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Starfleet Lt. Barclay's hologram convinces Janeway to pursue a dangerous, untested plan to bring Voyager home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor is torn between his duty to Voyager and his conscience when warrior holograms rebel against their Hirogen creators.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers that Nirrti is mutating the inhabitants of an unexplored planet with a machine that rearranges their DNA. Captured in an attempt to stop her, O'Neill must find a way to escape before he and SG-1 are subjected to the same fate.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lorne discovers a planet with dozens of satellites in orbit. However, inhabitants on this planet are no further advanced than the renaissance and have a flag with McKay's face. The team realize a game they had found earlier might be more than a game.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Investigating an abandoned space station, McKay mistakenly brings one of its scientists out of stasis. The scientist explains to the team that the base was the last effort by his people to avoid the repeated culling they've endured by the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With the entire city ordered to take a personal day the team does their best to unwind and enjoy their leisure time. Without warning a mysterious explosion rips through the city killing and injuring unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches the ocean for a mobile geothermal drilling station the ancients left dormant. Cautiously exploring the station, Teyla thinks she senses the presence of a Wraith. Weir, believing it's pressure affecting Teyla, has the team press on.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After helping relocate the Taranans, the Atlantis team realizes they haven't heard from the village in a long period of time. It appears the Taranans have just abandoned their village until McKay detects life signs well beneath the surface.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is shocked when a satellite housing a stargate takes up orbit above Atlantis. When the stargate begins transmitting an energy beam, attacking the city, McKay takes a page from the Ancients and opts to sink Atlantis back into the ocean.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Atlantis starts shutting down due to a damaged power system, Rodney McKay turns off all non-essential systems. But in just 28 hours, McKay realizes the city’s shields may fail completely and its inhabitants will succumb the vacuum of space.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: General Hammond and the Pentagon are forced to reveal the existence of the Stargate to other world governments. Senator Kinsey suggests that General Hammond be relieved of his command and that the civilian-run NID oversee the Stargate program.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers three human survivors on an off-world planet who claim to be under attack by hostile aliens. While Carter helps repair the ship's computer, she learns that the survivors are hiding a secret…and things may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.desc: Valeria se entera de lo que Pablo le dijo a Francisco en Miami, una llamada le da la oportunidad de retomar su vida. El pasado llega hasta el rancho San Román para complicarlo todo.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria apuesta al amor, y montada en su caballo, va en busca de su hombre. Paula está furiosa y Marcia anuncia el fin de Valeria. La verdadera identidad de José María queda al descubierto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo desconfían de Malcolm y Carmela, los nuevos empleados de Fernando, porque eran los antiguos mayordomos de Eduvina. Martín defiende a Dominga de las arbitrariedades de Carmela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín insulta a Carmela, ella y Malcolm se dan cuenta de que el abuelo es un obstáculo en su camino, Norma trata de abrirle los ojos a Gabriela. Rosario visita la hacienda y se pelea con Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Un nuevo pistolero intenta asesinar a Juan, Óscar reconoce el carro y lo siguen hasta la hacienda de Gabriela, donde se produce un enfrentamiento, Fernando encubre al autor de los ataques.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hombres armados custodian la hacienda de los Reyes día y noche. Carmela sigue su plan y finge un desmayo para que despidan a Dominga, por quien surge una guerra entre Martín y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: A pesar de la vigilancia, Dínora entra en la hacienda de los Reyes y le dispara a Juan, quien la denuncia. Dominga comienza a trabajar con los Reyes, se avecinan nuevos problemas amorosos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela desautoriza a Malcolm en el manejo de las pesebreras y reduce sus atribuciones, las Elizondo ganan terreno en la hacienda. Norma presiente que alguien las vigila en la oscuridad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm sospecha que hay una mujer oculta en un cuarto, Martín la ve. Los Reyes tratan de convencer a las Elizondo para que dejen a Gabriela, pero Sara se niega al conocer el plan de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena vigila a Fernando y lo sigue a la caballeriza, Malcolm se interpone en su camino, pero ella consigue una pista. Armando le ofrece a Fernando un apartamento para esconder a Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se aficiona a las apuestas, a Gabriela no le gusta pero acepta bajo presión. Rosario ve a Armando besar a Dínora, él le echa la culpa a ella y se alegra de que su mujer esté celosa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando trata de violar a Jimena en el campo y Sara se lo impide. Ante las quejas de las Elizondo, Gabriela respalda a su esposo y llama calumniadoras a sus hijas. Rosario acosa a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
